result.auto_summary:
Here is the structured summary in plain text bullet points:

**Primary Person(s) Discussed**

• Krishan (R/o Village Kondar, Palwal/howdel, Faridabad, HR)
• Sumit Kumar (also known as Cheetah @ Sumit Bichpadi)

**Family Members and Close Relations**

• Father's name: Sarwan Kumar (R/o Village Gajuwas, PS-Taranagar, Churu, Rajasthan) - Krishan
• Father's name: Satyaveer - Sumit
• Mother's name: Maya - Sumit

**Important Dates and Events**

• Age of teenager: Committed a crime under Section 307 IPC (no specific date mentioned)
• Apprehended and shifted to children home for 3 months (no specific date mentioned)
• Released after 3 months (no specific date mentioned)

**Legal Cases, Arrests, Court Actions, or Investigations**

• Involved in a murder case (no specific details provided) - Sumit
• Committed a crime under Section 307 IPC at the age of teenager - Krishan

**Associated Persons, Organizations, Vehicles, or Locations**

• Cousin's name: Aashish Sharma (s/o Rambhaj, pursuing PhD from MDU, Rohtak) - Krishan
• Associates:
	+ Sandeep @ Kala Jatehdi
	+ Priyawart @ Kala
	+ Nitish Pardhan R/o Kanoda, Bahadurgarh
	+ Goldi Barar
	+ Rajan Jaat
	+ Amit @ Chhota
• Anti-Gang:
	+ Ashok Pradhan R/o Nilohti, Haryana
	+ Ashok R/o Ratoli, Rohtak, Haryana

**Locations**

• Delhi, Haryana, Rajasthan, Bihar, Punjab, and Maharashtra

children.label: Personal Details
Born on April 2, 1997
Resident of Village Bichpari, Gohana, Sonipat, Haryana
Eyes: Black, Hair: Black
Criminal History
Involved in a crime under section 307 IPC as a teenager
Murdered Sunita and Rajesh in August 2016 using a hammer and knife
Killed Raghu Priyapati @ Raghu Satta Wala in August-September 2020 with a .32 pistol
Associates
Amit: Childhood friend, introduced to Kala Jatheri
Kala Jatheri: Introduced Sumit to gang life and directed him to kill Raghu Priyapati
Shera: Joined Sumit's gang in September 2020
Nitesh Pardhan: Joined Sumit's gang in September 2020
Krishan: Provided Sumit with five weapons, including .30, 9mm, and .32 caliber guns
Pawan: Met Sumit in Mumbai and arranged a flat for him
Family Members
Father: Satyaveer Singh (65 years old)
Mother: Maya Devi (58 years old)
Brother: Amit (32 years old, runs a cloth business and insurance agency)
Sister-in-law: Sawita (29 years old, A.Sub. Inspector in Haryana Police)
Sister: Sunaina (37 years old, teacher in a primary school)
Brother-in-law: Pradeep (39 years old, teacher)
Physical Characteristics
Tattoos on right arm with the name 'Sumit'
Long cut mark on left cheek
Skills and Expertise
Expert in swimming and firing skills
No military training
Economic Status
Medium economic status
Code Names
Code name: 'Cheeta'
